headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -29.7)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 229% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 114 quotes including 78 at strong intensity, though the score dropped significantly from yesterday's peak.
• At 23.6, frustrations remain well above the typical range but far from the 76-day high of 163.9.
• Optimism recovered notably from yesterday's low but stays in negative territory with many strong-intensity quotes still reflecting pessimism.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
